change_comments.message:
is more or less what I suspected... well done
The bigger problem is though that we had no test that detected the fault!
As we discussed we might need a stricter assert on one of the existing test and/or maybe we need to make sure we test with more than 1 (common/new)  module and verify the number of modules saved... 
Basically the new/improved test should FAIL if you comment out the fix in this patch.
This can be handled in a separate commit so our client can progress quickly and take this fix without further delay
